1. Click **$f(x)$** in the toolbar while editing a content block.

1. Enter your LaTeX formula in the text box and confirm that the Equation preview generates as expected:[^equation-preview]

   - To insert the equation inline, leave **Display mode** untoggled.
   - To insert the equation on its own line, toggle **Display mode** on.

   ![The two formula display modes](/guide/model-documentation/content_blocks/formula-display-modes.png){fig-alt="A screenshot showing the two formula display modes" .screenshot group="latex"}

1. Click **[{{< fa check >}}]{.green}** to add the equation to your content block.

[^equation-preview]: ![Equation preview in the formula editor](/guide/model-documentation/content_blocks/equation-preview.png){fig-alt="A screenshot showing the equation preview in the formula editor" .screenshot group="latex"}
